Product Manager — 7 years

Strategy & Discovery:
• Market research, competitive analysis, customer discovery interviews
• OKR framework — quarterly roadmap prioritization aligned to company strategy
• Wireframing, prototyping with Figma for early-stage concept validation

Delivery:
• Agile scrum — sprint planning, backlog grooming, user story writing, acceptance criteria
• Cross-functional collaboration — engineering, design, marketing, sales stakeholder management
• Go-to-market planning — launch readiness, enablement, phased rollout

Analytics & Measurement:
• Product analytics — Mixpanel, Amplitude event instrumentation and funnel analysis
• KPI tracking — activation, retention, NPS, revenue impact dashboards
• Data-driven prioritization — A/B test interpretation, user research synthesis
